[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001111101 6
1 001010100 3
2 010000001 2
3 100000001 2
4 111110010 6
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000101000 2

01 10 000010010 2
12 21 000000001 1
23 32 000101001 3
34 43 001010100 3 match 1
45 54 000000000 a match 5 6
56 65 000000001 1
67 76 100000000 1
70 07 000110010 3

02 20 000101000 2 match 7
13 31 000010001 2
24 42 000000000 a match 5 6
35 53 000000001 1
46 64 000000000 a match 5 6
57 75 010000000 1
60 06 000000000 a match 5 6
71 17 000010010 2

03 30 000111100 4
14 41 000010000 1
25 52 000000001 1
36 63 000000001 1
47 74 001010000 2
50 05 000000000 a match 5 6
61 16 000000001 1
72 27 100100000 2

04 40 000010100 2
15 51 000000001 1
26 62 100000001 2 match 3
37 73 001110000 3
